zh-CN.title: CocoaPods 下 podfile 如何 debug
zh-CN.description: 使用 Ruby 调试器在 Podfile 中插入断点，借助自省排查 CocoaPods 构建与配置问题。
zh-CN.content:
Background

查了 Xcodeproj 和 CocoaPods 的文档之后我都没有得到很好的解答，所以我就想用 xcodeproj 本身的接口去处理这件事情。

Resolve

由于 Podfile 本质上是 Ruby 脚本，所以这里我通常会使用 Ruby 的 debugger 去操作，通过 Ruby 强大的自省能力，在 debugger 里进行尝试然后找到我们需要的接口，开始之前我们需要安装一个 Ruby 的工具，步骤如下：

首先是安装 debugger gem install pry
接着在 Podfile 的开头导入 require ‘pry’
然后在我们想要插入断点的地方插入 binding.pry 语句就可以了

en.title: How to debug a podfile in CocoaPods?
en.description: Use the Ruby debugger to insert breakpoints in the Podfile and use introspection to troubleshoot CocoaPods build and configuration issues.
en.content:
Background

After checking the documentation for Xcodeproj and CocoaPods, I didn't get a good answer, so I wanted to use the Xcodeproj API itself to handle this.

Resolve

Since a Podfile is essentially a Ruby script, I usually use Ruby's debugger to operate on it. Leveraging Ruby's powerful introspection capabilities, I can experiment in the debugger and find the interfaces we need. Before starting, we need to install a Ruby tool. The steps are as follows:

First, install the debugger gem: `gem install pry`
Next, import `require` at the beginning of your Podfile.‘pry’
Then, simply insert the `binding.pry` statement where you want to insert the breakpoint.
